body:
APPROVE
Implementation cleanly adds a `checkGitRepoHealth` helper covering all three requested checks, wires it into `runDoctor` with a new `--fix` flag, and ships four targeted tests that corrupt/clean/verify behavior. The symlink-resolved worktree comparison and the `--git-dir` probe (which works even when core.bare lies) show thoughtfulness about the corruption modes described in the bead.
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260424T065743-2ad6ca89/reviewer-stream.log
